core_principles: Emotion First: The UI must feel like a calming, safe retreat.
Generous Spacing: Avoid cluttered metrics. Use negative space to reduce cognitive load (crucial for wellness apps).
Optical Softness: Employ large border radii (24px for cards, pill shapes for buttons) and ultra-diffuse ambient shadows.

1_Header.details: Greeting uses H1. Right side contains a flex-row of two icon buttons (Bluetooth, Help) with 12px gap.

2_CalendarPill.details: Background #FFFFFF, Icon + Text (Inter Medium). Padding horizontal 16px, vertical 8px.

3_RecoveryIndex.details: White card. Huge circular progress using SVG or expo-linear-gradient trick. Inside circle: '78/100' (Poppins Bold). Below: 'Recovery Index' and a green success pill '+5% this week'. Dot indicators at the very bottom of the card.

4_AutoRecoveries.details: Section header with H2 + Lightning Icon. List of 3 cards. Each card: White bg, row layout (Icon left, Title/Time right). Soft shadow.

5_HowWeKnowYou.details: 3 metrics cards (Heart Rate, Sleep, Stress). Width approx 120px each. Left-aligned content: Icon top, Value middle (Poppins), Label bottom (Inter).

6_RecoveryPlan.details: Header with '0/3 done' pill. Task cards include Alarm/Calendar icons + check circle icon on the right.

7_VentCTA.details: Gradient from #9D4CDD to #7F00FF. Large Mic icon. White text. 24px border radius. Fills width.

8_BottomTabBar.details: White background, top shadow. 5 tabs. The center 'Mic' tab is a floating action button (FAB) that translates Y upwards by -20px, large purple circle.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use ONLY React Native core components (View, Text, ScrollView, SafeAreaView) and StyleSheet.create.
CRITICAL: Use `testID` attribute on all interactive elements, cards, and text values for automated testing (equivalent to data-testid).
Fonts: Implement @expo-google-fonts/inter and @expo-google-fonts/poppins. Use Poppins for H1/H2 and numbers, Inter for body/labels.
Icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Ionicons). Do not use external image URLs for icons.
Gradients: Use expo-linear-gradient for the Vent CTA banner and the Scorecard circular progress.

Scroll behavior: Wrap the main content in a ScrollView. Add a bottom padding of at least 100px to the ScrollView contentContainerStyle so the absolute positioned bottom tab bar does not overlap the Vent CTA.
Shadows: Apply the soft diffuse shadows defined in the guidelines to give the cards an 'elevated, floating' premium feel against the #F7F0F5 background.
